title: Budgets are now generally available ​
body:
**July 6, 2026**

Budgets, including budgets for Unity AI Gateway, are now generally available.

Budgets let admins define spending thresholds. For requests managed through Unity AI Gateway, including [Genie](/aws/en/genie/) interactions, admins can set additional per-user thresholds and overrides, with configurable actions such as email alerting and usage blocking.

See [Create and monitor budgets](/aws/en/admin/account-settings/budgets) and [Manage budgets for Unity AI Gateway](/aws/en/ai-gateway/budgets).

ref_links.text: Manage budgets for Unity AI Gateway
